info.name: BBPS Simulator + Integrator Flow
info.description: Collection to test BBPS simulator forwarding and integrator callbacks using XML payloads.

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ns2:BillFetchRequest xmlns:ns2="http://bbps.org/schema">
<Head ver="1.0" ts="2026-03-23T12:00:00+05:30" origInst="BBCU" refId="PP01BB120000466OKME6916002R60821200"/>
<Analytics>
<Tag name="FETCHREQUESTSTART" value="2026-03-23T11:59:00+05:30"/>
<Tag name="FETCHREQUESTEND" value="2026-03-23T12:04:00+05:30"/>
</Analytics>
<Txn ts="2026-03-23T12:00:00+05:30" msgId="PP01BB120000466NHAA6916885M60821200">
<RiskScores>
<Score provider="PP01" type="TXNRISK" value="030"/>
<Score provider="BBPS" type="TXNRISK" value="030"/>
</RiskScores>
</Txn>
<Customer mobile="99XXXXX999"/>
<Agent id="PP01XXXXMOBA00000001">
<Device>
<Tag name="IP" value="127.255.255.255"/>
<Tag name="IMEI" value="XXXXXXXX" />
<Tag name="OS" value="ANDROID"/>
<Tag name="APP" value="PHONEPE"/>
<Tag name="INITIATING_CHANNEL" value="MOB"/>
</Device>
</Agent>
<BillDetails>
<Biller id="MPCZ00000MAP01"/>
<CustomerParams>
<Tag name="IVRS" value="N2436005536"/>
</CustomerParams>
</BillDetails>
</ns2:BillFetchRequest>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ns2:BillPaymentRequest xmlns:ns2="http://bbps.org/schema">
    <Head ver="1.0" ts="2026-03-18T22:00:00+05:30" origInst="BBCU" refId="HGVRV22K10DDY0BTJ727444XF2160772162"/>
    <Analytics>
        <Tag name="PAYREQUESTSTART" value="2026-03-18T22:00:00+05:30"/>
        <Tag name="PAYREQUESTEND" value="2026-03-18T22:00:00+05:30"/>
    </Analytics>
    <Txn ts="2026-03-18T22:00:00+05:30" type="FORWARD TYPE REQUEST" msgId="HGPQE232B8RNZ5YYU741729T1JU60772159" txnReferenceId="BD016077BAKAAAHT0IRC" paymentRefId="2n22ZrB5yh3PvRQSormr">
        <RiskScores>
            <Score provider="BD01" type="TXNRISK" value="030"/>
        </RiskScores>
    </Txn>
    <Customer mobile="94XXXXX754">
        <Tag name="EMAIL" value="XXXXXXXX" />
    </Customer>
    <Agent id="BD01XXXXMOB000000001">
        <Device>
            <Tag name="INITIATING_CHANNEL" value="MOB"/>
            <Tag name="IP" value="2409:40c2:804a:9ddc:8000::"/>
            <Tag name="IMEI" value="XXXXXXXX" />
            <Tag name="OS" value="Win64"/>
            <Tag name="APP" value="Amazon"/>
        </Device>
    </Agent>
    <BillDetails>
        <Biller id="MAHA00000MAH01"/>
        <CustomerParams>
            <Tag name="Consumer No" value="054260001585"/>
        </CustomerParams>
    </BillDetails>
    <BillerResponse customerName="XXXXXXXXXX" amount="38000" dueDate="2026-04-04" billDate="2026-03-15" billNumber="XXXXXXXXXX" billPeriod=".93">
        <Tag name="Early Payment Amount" value="38000"/>
        <Tag name="Late Payment Amount" value="38000"/>
    </BillerResponse>
    <AdditionalInfo>
        <Tag name="Early Payment Date" value="2026-03-24"/>
        <Tag name="PC" value="4"/>
        <Tag name="Disconn Tag" value="0"/>
        <Tag name="Bill Month" value="2603"/>
        <Tag name="DTC Code" value="4260319"/>
        <Tag name="Bill Type" value="POSTPAID"/>
    </AdditionalInfo>
    <PaymentMethod quickPay="No" splitPay="No" OFFUSPay="No" paymentMode="Credit Card"/>
    <Amount>
        <Amt amount="38000" custConvFee="0" currency="356"/>
        <SplitPayAmount>0</SplitPayAmount>
        <Tag name="Early Payment Amount" value="38000"/>
    </Amount>
</ns2:BillPaymentRequest>

<BillFetchRequest xmlns="http://bbps.org/schema">
    <Head ver="1.0" ts="2026-03-26T12:10:00+05:30" origInst="SIM" refId="REF-FETCH-DIRECT-001"/>
    <Txn ts="2026-03-26T12:10:00+05:30" msgId="MSG-FETCH-DIRECT-001" txnReferenceId="TXN-FETCH-DIRECT-001"/>
    <Customer mobile="9999999999"/>
    <Agent id="AGENT1">
        <Device>
            <Tag name="MOBILE" value="9999999999"/>
        </Device>
    </Agent>
    <BillDetails>
        <Biller id="BILLER1"/>
        <CustomerParams>
            <Tag name="ACCOUNTNUMBER" value="ACC123"/>
        </CustomerParams>
    </BillDetails>
</BillFetchRequest>

<BillPaymentRequest xmlns="http://bbps.org/schema">
    <Head ver="1.0" ts="2026-03-26T12:15:00+05:30" origInst="SIM" refId="REF-PAY-DIRECT-001"/>
    <Txn ts="2026-03-26T12:15:00+05:30" msgId="MSG-PAY-DIRECT-001" txnReferenceId="TXN-PAY-DIRECT-001"/>
    <Customer mobile="9999999999"/>
    <Agent id="AGENT1">
        <Device>
            <Tag name="MOBILE" value="9999999999"/>
        </Device>
    </Agent>
    <BillDetails>
        <Biller id="BILLER1"/>
        <CustomerParams>
            <Tag name="ACCOUNTNUMBER" value="ACC123"/>
        </CustomerParams>
    </BillDetails>
    <BillerCategory category="ELECTRICITY"/>
    <PaymentMethod paymentMode="UPI"/>
    <Amount>
        <Amt amount="100.00"/>
        <AmountBreakUp/>
        <SplitPayAmount>0</SplitPayAmount>
    </Amount>
    <PaymentInformation>
        <Tag name="paymentRefId" value="PREF-DIRECT-001"/>
    </PaymentInformation>
</BillPaymentRequest>

item.name: 5) Simulate Integrator Callback: BillFetchResponse ACK Endpoint

body.raw:
<BillFetchResponse xmlns="http://bbps.org/schema">
    <Head ver="1.0" ts="2026-03-26T12:20:00+05:30" origInst="BILLER" refId="REF-FETCH-CB-001"/>
    <Reason responseCode="000" approvalRefNum="AB123456" responseReason="Successful"/>
    <Txn ts="2026-03-26T12:20:00+05:30" msgId="MSG-CB-FETCH-001" txnReferenceId="TXN-CB-FETCH-001"/>
    <BillDetails>
        <Biller id="BILLER1"/>
        <CustomerParams>
            <Tag name="ACCOUNTNUMBER" value="ACC123"/>
        </CustomerParams>
    </BillDetails>
    <BillerResponse amount="100.00" dueDate="2026-03-31" billDate="2026-03-01"/>
</BillFetchResponse>

item.name: 6) Simulate Integrator Callback: BillPaymentResponse ACK Endpoint

body.raw:
<BillPaymentResponse xmlns="http://bbps.org/schema">
    <Head ver="1.0" ts="2026-03-26T12:25:00+05:30" origInst="BILLER" refId="REF-PAY-CB-001"/>
    <Reason responseCode="000" approvalRefNum="BP123456" responseReason="Successful"/>
    <Txn ts="2026-03-26T12:25:00+05:30" msgId="MSG-CB-PAY-001" txnReferenceId="TXN-CB-PAY-001"/>
    <BillDetails>
        <Biller id="BILLER1"/>
        <CustomerParams>
            <Tag name="ACCOUNTNUMBER" value="ACC123"/>
        </CustomerParams>
    </BillDetails>
    <BillerResponse amount="100.00" dueDate="2026-03-31" billDate="2026-03-01"/>
</BillPaymentResponse>

CREATE TABLE billerdb.payment_transactions (
    txn_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    bill_id INT REFERENCES bill_details(bill_id),
    bbps_txn_ref VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    amount_paid NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL,
    payment_mode VARCHAR(50), 
    payment_channel varchar(50) NULL,
    payment_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'SUCCESS',
    payer_info JSONB,
    paid_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
